title: 【抵制TVB戰線, 要人！】平安夜特別任務 - 賽馬會 X TVB代言人

replies.msg:
「藝人代言」係TVB重要收入來源
當然唔可以放過！

無論藝人係黃定扮黃
我哋只能勸誡佢哋早日跳槽

【平安夜精選@24 Dec 2019】
1.派嬲
2.洗版
3.推post，每人推幾下冇咁辛苦
4.罷買
5. 互like留言，推上FB留言熱門

賽馬會 X 馮盈盈、洪永城
1. https://facebook.com/TheHongKongJockeyClub/
2. 鬼佬讀者：https://facebook.com/HKJCRacingSports/
FB search: HKJC

※留言template
無綫新聞，出名呃人！
貴會多年堅守政治中立、致力建設社會嘅世界級賽馬機構，相反TVB屢遭投訴，指控其新聞偏頗不實，成為中共喉舌，合作及播放賽事定當損害馬會利益，影響慈善及社區捐助收入，懇請貴會愛惜寶貴形象，改於具公信力電視台播放賽事，並拒絕以TVB藝人作推廣。

英文版：
This is my sincere advice to HKJC to NOT advertise and broadcast racing programme on TVB and don't use their artists as brand ambassadors. HKers are currently boycotting the brands and products appear on TVB advertisement as the station often reports biased or fake news in in favour of Chinese Communist Party (CCP) and Hong Kong Government to mislead audiences. The majority of HKers have resentment and grudges against TVB, stopping all cooperation with TVB would ensure your organization to be politically neutral. Please consider to cooperate with other media platforms such as RTHK and ViuTV.


講下臭屎
無綫新聞，出名呃人！
馬會是一直用賭徒血汗錢做「慈善服務」🐴，依家仲任用馮盈盈🧛‍♀️ + 洪永城🧛‍♂️做代言，間接資助TVB新聞部，實在可惡！😡
[Source] http://bit.ly/35PXPpC


歡迎用呢幅圖留言
